pages.text: Today is a very busy day! Mama and I have lots of things to do and see.

blocks.text: Today is a very busy day! Mama and I have lots of things to do and see.

pages.text: We walk to the station and find people in a queue. Old people and young people, loud people and quiet people, all going to town.

blocks.text: We walk to the station and find people in a queue. Old people and young people, loud people and quiet people, all going to town.

pages.text: Through the minibus window, I see cars driving by. Fast cars and slow cars, big cars and small cars.

blocks.text: Through the minibus window, I see cars driving by. Fast cars and slow cars, big cars and small cars.

pages.text: There are so many buildings in town! Tall ones and short ones, glass ones and brick ones, everywhere I look.

blocks.text: There are so many buildings in town! Tall ones and short ones, glass ones and brick ones, everywhere I look.

pages.text: Mama and I walk in and out of shops. Shops for clothes and shops for books, shops for bags and all sorts of things.

blocks.text: Mama and I walk in and out of shops. Shops for clothes and shops for books, shops for bags and all sorts of things.

pages.text: Mama tries on some shoes. Red shoes and green shoes, high shoes and low shoes.

blocks.text: Mama tries on some shoes. Red shoes and green shoes, high shoes and low shoes.

pages.text: In a big store, we fill a trolley with food. Boxes of cereal, and sacks of fruit. Bags of flour and bottles of juice.

blocks.text: In a big store, we fill a trolley with food. Boxes of cereal, and sacks of fruit. Bags of flour and bottles of juice.

pages.text: Mama shows me the toys and asks me to choose! There are soft toys and round toys, loud toys and fast toys.

blocks.text: Mama shows me the toys and asks me to choose! There are soft toys and round toys, loud toys and fast toys.

pages.text: Today we’ve bought lots of things! Bags of food and bags of clothes. A pair of shoes and even some treats.

blocks.text: Today we’ve bought lots of things! Bags of food and bags of clothes. A pair of shoes and even some treats.

pages.text: Back at home, in our quiet house, I take out the special gift that Mama bought just for me!

blocks.text: Back at home, in our quiet house, I take out the special gift that Mama bought just for me!
